name: Crustless Spinach Quiche
recipeIngredient: (or substitute ends of a bunch of green onions for chives – chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 2 quiche dishes, 2 pie plates or a big rectangular dish.
2. Spray with Pam.
3. Heat oven to 350 degrees.
4. Thaw and drain spinach.
5. Press extra liquid out of spinach.
6. Grate Cheddar cheese in processor.
7. Chop onions.
8. Mix flour and eggs in processor.
9. Add all other ingredients.
10. Bake at 350 degrees for 50 to 60 minutes until set in middle and slightly brown at edge. (This takes only 30 minutes in 2 glass quiche dishes.)
